a.xlink:title: Returns the set this printing belongs to.
Adds an ExactCard to the specified zone.
Adds the given card to the given zone. Saves the operation to history if successful.
Returns a printing of a card from the same set as another given printing when possible.
Attempts to load a card image from local disk or custom folders.
Adds a card using the preferred printing if available.
Adds a printing of the card to the specified zone (Mainboard, Sideboard, or Tokensboard).
Adds a printing to the mainboard zone.
Adds a printing to the sideboard zone.
Adds a printing to the tokens zone.
Constructs a widget for displaying and controlling the card count in a specific zone.
Swaps one copy of the card at the given index between the maindeck and sideboard. No-ops if index is ...
Slot called by the worker when an image is loaded. Inserts the pixmap into the cache and emits pixmap...
Access the singleton instance of CardPictureLoader.
Preload a list of cards into the pixmap cache (limited to CACHED_CARD_PER_DECK_MAX).
Clears the network disk cache of the worker.
Retrieve a card pixmap, either from cache or enqueued for loading.
Sets the deck for this tab.
